security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https:; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src blob: data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.longDescription: A local-first resume builder with form and Markdown editing, PDF preview, AI assistance, backups and portable exports.
